name: @kurrent/gaffer-telemetry-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker that ingests gaffer telemetry envelopes, translates to PostHog's batch shape, and serves the public telemetry notice

scripts.build: pnpm run render-notice && pnpm run gen-types
scripts.test: pnpm run build && vitest run && wrangler deploy --env staging --dry-run --outdir=.wrangler/dryrun
